content.en:
Now, none of the ultimate creatures on the Demon Whisker Island are Ye Tian's opponents, even if they can suppress Ye Tian together, and even surround and kill one of Ye Tian's replica bodies, but he can condense the replica body again and again, the number of ultimate creatures is a huge threat to the existence of the other Nine Realms peaks, but it cannot threaten Ye Tian.

After a while.

Ye Tian had already collected countless resources from the Demon Whisker Island, and if he brought back the human race, he would definitely be able to cultivate a large number of strong people.

He now wanted to leave the Tianqu Forbidden Zone first.

"Mastiff-kun should know how to get out, right?"

Ye Tian came to the Demon Sea again, and came to the place where Mastiff Jun was retreating.

Mastiff Jun saw Ye Tian coming and came out directly.

At this time, he was very surprised, because Ye Tian's aura was much stronger than before.

How long has it been?

He didn't have any improvement, and Ye Tian had only entered the Tianqu Forbidden Area for a long time, and he had such a terrifying improvement.

He even doubted now that he could remain undefeated if he fought Ye Tian again, maybe he wouldn't be able to do it.

"Lord Ye Tian Realm, I don't know what's going on?"

Mastiff asked.

Ye Tian asked, "Brother Mastiff, I wonder if you know how to leave the Tianqu Forbidden Zone?"

He didn't know how to leave the Tianqu Forbidden Area here, after all, the different positions of the Tianqu Forbidden Zone had different directions to go out, and he couldn't give him specific experience.

"Ye Tianjing Lord wants to leave the Tianqu Forbidden Zone? Leaving the Tianqu Forbidden Zone from the Demon Sea is a little troublesome. You'll need to traverse several dangerous places before finding a distorted place in dimensional space-time, from where you can sense the location of the outside world and get out. "

Mastiff said.

"Please also ask Brother Mastiff Jun to inform me specifically. Ye Tian said.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, this is also a way out that I have worked so hard to find, and I have paid a great price......"

The meaning of what Mastiff Jun said is very clear, that is, to benefit.

He felt that Ye Tian's strength could skyrocket in such a short period of time, and he must have a great opportunity, and there must be a lot of treasures obtained.

He has been comprehending the ultimate rules of the Demon Sea on the side of the Pillar of the Demon Sea, and he has not explored the Tianqu Forbidden Area at all, and the wealth on his body is really not much.

Therefore, being able to earn a little bit from Ye Tian is a little bit.

"No problem'.!"

Ye Tian nodded, by buying it for a little price, he could take all the resources in his hand out.

Otherwise, if one day encounters danger, all the replica bodies will fall, and the treasures on the body will be gone.

Therefore, it is okay to give Mastiff a little benefit.

Immediately, the two sides discussed the price issue and finally settled on it.

"Here you go!"

Ye Tian threw a batch of resources to Mastiff Jun.

After reading it, Mastiff Jun was very satisfied, and immediately gave the information to Ye Tian.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian quickly left.

Mastiff didn't think too much about it, he returned to the pillar of the Demon Sea, and continued to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Demon Sea.

......

After Ye Tian passed through the Demon Sea, he continued to move forward, following the route given by the Mastiff King, and continued to shuttle.

After a while, he arrived at the Ice Cave, which was full of ice worlds, and there were countless ice caves, and there was a probability that there were ultimate creatures in these ice caves, and they were all ultimate creatures who walked through the ice cave system.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian bombarded the ice cave with one blow, but he hadn't even smashed the ice cave yet.

"It's not ordinary ice, these ice are all condensed by the ultimate power of the ice cave, this ice cave should be at the same level as the Yuan Xing, but it is not as big as the suppression of the Yuan Star. Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't go to study the ice cave, but continued to move forward, there were ultimate creatures blocking him, and he didn't kill him, there was no need to kill some ultimate creatures, it was better to leave first.

The Ice Cave is not dangerous, just be careful and avoid the ultimate creatures, but once you leave the Ice Cave, you will encounter the most dangerous place - the Silver Light Zone.

The silver light area is dangerous, and the silver light is terrifyingly aggressive.

Mastiff Jun has the ultimate body of the Demon Sea, which can be called an immortal body, so he can cross the silver light area, and other Nine Realm pinnacles who have comprehended the ultimate rules may not be able to break into the past.

Silver light area in front.

"This silver light is also an ultimate system!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

There are indeed many ultimate systems in the Sea of Dimensions, but it is also because of a lot that many of them can make many Nine Realms Peaks become Ultimate Realm Masters, but it is not clear whether the Silver Light System has given birth to Ultimate Realm Masters?

If the Ultimate Realm Master had not been born, he would have chosen to comprehend the path of the Silver Light Ultimate System in the future, after all, this Ultimate System looked extremely powerful, much better than the Ice Cave Ultimate System.

It's just that only by studying the Silver Light Ultimate System in depth can we know whether there is an Ultimate Realm Master in this Ultimate System.

If there is an Ultimate Realm Master, he will perceive an incomparably huge figure standing at the end of the Ultimate System.

At that time, I knew that the quota of this ultimate system was occupied, and it was impossible to continue research.

Ye Tian had never experienced this situation, but he learned something about it later.

......

Ye Tian touched his hand to the silver light area, and a terrifying silver light invaded, as if to bombard Ye Tian to death.

At this time.

Ye Tian urged the abyssal body, and cooperated with the five-fold abyss star ultimate rule to withstand the shining light of the silver light.

"Gotta get out of here quickly!"

Ye Tian shuttled quickly, and with his powerful physical body, it took some time to finally pass through the silver light area.

"Fortunately, my body is strong enough, if I only enter the strength of the Tianqu forbidden area, then it is estimated that I will not be able to bear it!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After leaving the silver light area, the next few dangerous places were not so dangerous, (okay) Ye Tian passed through these dangerous places, and finally came to the place where the dimensional space-time was distorted.

As soon as he entered here, he felt that everything around him was distorting, but the Ultimate Will could sense the outside of the Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

Immediately, he slashed away with one blow, cut open a space-time passage, and came out of the Tianqu forbidden area.

......

Outside the Tianqu Forbidden Area.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came out, and then returned to the multidimensional territory.

After a period of time, Ye Tian returned to the multidimensional territory and took out all the treasures on his body.

The harvest this time is too big, enough for the human race to cultivate a large number of ultimate powerhouses.

Many of these resources are helpful for refining the physical body, which is very suitable for the strong men of the human race who walk through the abyssal star system.

However, Ye Tian didn't really take it all out, only took out a little bit to focus on cultivating some geniuses of the human race in the Abyssal Star System.

And just like that, another long time has passed.
